name: ScraperCity API
description: ScraperCity provides ready-to-run web scrapers for instant lead lists. The API allows you to scrape leads from various platforms including Apollo, Google Maps, Yelp, and more. Scrape jobs are asynchronous - start a scrape, poll for status, then download results.
